message:
Add comptime stdlib bridge - reduces handler boilerplate 82%

New: src/codegen/native/stdlib_bridge.zig
- genSimpleCall: fixed-arg runtime calls (most common)
- genNoArgCall: zero-arg functions
- genVarArgCall: variable arg count (min-max)
- genNoTryCall: non-error-returning functions

Example conversion (re.zig):
- Before: 76 lines, 5 hand-written handlers
- After: 14 lines, 6 one-line specs

Pattern: Python call → runtime.module.func(allocator, args)
OS module unchanged - uses Zig stdlib directly (different pattern)
